ddls:
CREATE TABLE "case_details" (
  "case_number" TEXT /* Unique case number for the accident */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the investigator handling the case */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the case */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the case details */,
  "case_open_date" TEXT /* Date the case was opened */,
  "case_close_date" TEXT /* Date the case was closed */,
  "case_duration_days" INTEGER /* Duration of the case in days */,
  "case_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the case (e.g., conviction, acquittal, dismissed) */,
  "case_summary_url" TEXT /* URL to the detailed case summary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_details_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigator_id") REFERENCES investigators ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charges" (
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accident the charge is related to */,
  "charge_description" TEXT /* Description of the charge */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the charge */,
  "charge_filed_date" TEXT /* Date the charge was filed */,
  "charge_disposition_date" TEXT /* Date the charge was disposed of */,
  "charge_disposition" TEXT /* Disposition of the charge (e.g., convicted, not guilty, dismissed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the investigator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the investigator belongs to */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the investigator */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the investigator */,
  "specializations" TEXT /* Specializations of the investigator (e.g., accident reconstruction, forensics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area code for the location */,
  "x_coord" REAL /* X coordinate of the location */,
  "y_coord" REAL /* Y coordinate of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "street_name" TEXT /* Name of the street */,
  "street_number" TEXT /* Number of the street */,
  "intersection_name_1" TEXT /* Name of the first intersecting street */,
  "intersection_name_2" TEXT /* Name of the second intersecting street */,
  "nearby_landmarks" TEXT /* Nearby landmarks (e.g., school, park) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributing factor */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accident the factor is related to */,
  "factor_type" TEXT /* Type of contributing factor (e.g., speeding, impairment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contributing factor */,
  "factor_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the contributing factor (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "factor_evidence" TEXT /* Evidence supporting the contributing factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_types" (
  "road_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the road type (e.g., highway, arterial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the road type */,
  "speed_limit" INTEGER /* Speed limit of the road type */,
  "road_width" REAL /* Width of the road */,
  "number_of_lanes" INTEGER /* Number of lanes on the road */,
  "road_material" TEXT /* Material of the road (e.g., asphalt, concrete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("road_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restraint_use" (
  "restraint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restraint use instance */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accident the restraint use is related to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of restraint or helmet used (e.g., seatbelt, helmet) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the restraint or helmet use */,
  "restraint_type" TEXT /* Specific type of restraint used (e.g., seatbelt, airbag, helmet) */,
  "restraint_effectiveness" TEXT /* Effectiveness of the restraint (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restraint_id")
)
